content.en:
There are hundreds of thousands of community boundaries in the Hanhai District Boundary, and there are too many creatures in each community boundary, and many of them have no backers behind them at all, who will help them evacuate?

Even they didn't know about the Growing Nest at all, and they didn't know that something was going to happen to their community.

It's just that their strength is too weak, and they can't touch this matter at all!

Of course, the small forces that received the information began to evacuate at all costs, but if they didn't reach the realm of Dao Ancestors, they couldn't even enter the Silent Black Sea, and they could only be included in the void or treasures in their bodies by Dao Ancestors, so they could be transferred.

But the small forces will not transfer all the creatures under their command, after all, in that case, the price to pay will be too great, and a lot of time will be wasted.

Therefore, they will only remove some of the elite, which will cause many living beings to be abandoned.

Ye Tian also regretted seeing this, but in fact it was so cruel!

He didn't help, because even if he helped, he couldn't help, this was a matter involving a large regional boundary, hundreds of thousands of living beings in the community boundary, what could he do?

The Dao Ancestor of the Hanhai District Boundary and some of the living beings have withdrawn to the Hanhai District Boundary close to the Hanhai Wind Belt, and there are also some community boundaries here, which should not be covered by the super-large ancient nest.

After all, no matter how large the nest is, it can't be so big, so it should be very safe to stay here!

To put it simply, some areas of the Hanhai area will be covered, and the rest of the area will be safe.

It is the creatures of this area that need to be evacuated now.

However, there was no force to evacuate to the other end of the Cut Off Black Mountain, because the resources there were too poor, and if you went there, you couldn't even guarantee your usual cultivation.

......

Time flies, and the growing nest is growing at an incredible rate, and it is already about to become a truly super-large nest.

Moreover, many community boundaries have been swallowed up by this growing nest.

It can be said that this time is a catastrophe in the Hanhai District!

However, the Hanhai Territory is a dispensable existence for other regional boundaries, and losing most of the territory in exchange for the countless benefits of the Boulder Tribe is a very cost-effective deal.

"The speed at which this growing nest is expanding is getting more and more terrifying!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He knew that this was the expansion of those primordial artifacts that had once again accelerated the expansion of the Growing Nest, and coupled with the fact that the Growing Nest had swallowed the origin of many community realms, it would also accelerate its growth.

At this rate, it won't be long before it really stabilizes.

Another period of time has passed.

Finally, on this day, this growing ancient nest was completely stabilized, like an incomparably terrifying behemoth located at the boundary of the Hanhai District, occupying half of the area of the boundary of the Hanhai District.

Compared to this nest, the other nests are simply small and negligible.

Ye Tian had never imagined that an ancient nest could be so big, countless times larger than the community boundary.

At the same time, the nest also had a name.

The Ancient Nest of Monoliths!

......

Inside the Boulder Nest.

At a huge cost, the Boulder Tribe forcibly opened the passage between the Boulder Tribe and the Boulder Ancient Lair, allowing dense primordial artifacts to enter this Boulder Ancient Lair from the territory of the Boulder Tribe.

Then, one by one, the Avatar-level Primordial Antiquities also entered, and they also transferred countless resources from the Boulder Tribe.

Even some treasured land, they paid the price and forcibly moved over.

Of course, the Boulder Tribe still has some avatar-level and countless primordial artifact cannon fodder to fend off other tribes.

Except for those Avatar-level Primordial Artifacts, the other Primordial Artifacts may not have time to withdraw here, and can only be reduced to real cannon fodder.

But there's no way around it!

In the case of multiple tribes invading and attacking the Boulder Tribe, it is naturally impossible for them to all be evacuated, and many primordial artifacts must be sacrificed.

And those primordial antiquities that have no wisdom are naturally the objects of sacrifice, and the artifact-level primordial antiquities are not willing to sacrifice.

After a long time, all the primordial artifacts that could be evacuated were evacuated, and the last remaining artifact-level primordial artifacts also came along the passageway.

"Destroy the passage!"

Bloodstone, the patriarch of the Boulder Tribe, commanded.

Rumble!!!!

A Dimensional Physiographic-level powerhouse intervened and destroyed this passage.

At the same time, they reinforced the treasures on top of the Boulder Nest, making the defense of the Megalithic Nest stronger, and cutting off the connection between the Megalithic Nest and the Primordial Sea.

In this case, if those tribes want to leap over, they must gather a large number of Avatar-level peak masters and pay an unimaginable price before they can leap over.

This still has to be the case if the Boulder tribe does not resist, otherwise it will still not be successful.

"It's done, our Megalith Tribe is finally safe!"

Bloodstone smiled.

"Patriarch, we still have to be careful, the five forces of the Silent Black Sea are much stronger than us, if they destroy us at all costs, we still can't bear it!"

A Transformation-Class Primordial Antiquity reminded.

"Don't worry, we don't pose a threat to him, if we destroy us, we can still kill some of their Ninefold Ancestors at any cost, they definitely don't want to have such a loss. Bloodstone said.

Immediately, he began to order these avatar-level primordial artifacts to transform the Boulder Ancient Nest into a truly powerful fortress.

At the same time, these Avatar-level Primordial Artifacts gathered countless stone-type Primordial Artifacts on the Silent Black Sea to gather around the Giant Stone Nest.

Then, countless black mist shrouded this huge stone ancient nest, forming a natural barrier, and the countless stone primordial artifacts stayed in the black mist, if a cultivator approached here, they would be attacked by these countless primordial antiquities.

.......

this day.

The Nine Primordial Ancestors of the five forces gathered here at the Giant Stone Ancient Nest in the Hanhai District Boundary and demanded the remaining half of the payment.

Bloodstone didn't dare not give it, but honestly gave the benefits that should be given one by one.

After this time, the Boulder Tribe will be difficult to recover for countless years, but it is enough to keep the tribe and prevent the tribe from being destroyed!

If the tribe is gone, no matter how many resources there are, it will be someone else's!

Ancient Spring Xuanlou.

Ye Tian stayed here, but he also knew some of the situation of the Boulder Ancient Nest, but he didn't go over again.

After all, he can't enter the Boulder Ancient Lair!

But on this day, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor gave him a place to enter the Giant Stone Ancient Nest.

"Landlord, I'm going to enter the Great Stone Lair?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

What did he get in there for?

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor smiled and said, "Endless Dao Ancestor, this involves the cooperation between the Giant Stone Tribe and the five forces. This time, the Boulder tribe paid a heavy price in order to be able to descend on the Silent Black Sea, and in addition to giving us a lot of resources, they also had to give us some treasure land to use for a period of time. Some of these treasures are very helpful for you to improve your life level and cultivation. And these treasures have been moved to the inside of the Boulder Ancient Lair, and after a while, you Sevenfold Ancestors will be able to enter the inside of the Boulder Ancient Lair and enjoy the benefits of those treasure lands. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood, and he had some expectations in his heart!
